TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cirakayan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 217 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 144 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 73 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 58%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirakayan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cirakayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cirakayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirakayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirakayan hya' ga Cihafayan. tay 'zil na Cirakayan hya' ga Cingaroan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨirakajan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħoŋ riŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaroan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cirakayan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 217 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 66% kyan ku 144 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 34% kyan ku 73 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 58%, binah lihuyan s'uli 8%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirakayan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Cirakayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cirakayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirakayan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirakayan hya' ga Cihafayan. tay 'zil na Cirakayan hya' ga Cingaroan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨirakajan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħoŋ riŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨirakajan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaroan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
